note: Phase 4 CERT (NVFP4-mm CPU wire lane vs CUDA-resident lane, greedy self-parity, gemma4 lane-native 9-prompt pack) = 6/9 token-identical + 3 attributed near-tie argmax flips (CUDA f16 KV vs CPU f32 KV; CUDA token = CPU #2 at 0.047-0.111 raw-logit gap); no wiring/kernel bug. G4 perf (median 5 warm runs, 128 greedy tokens, RTX 3060 Laptop sm_86 driver 576.83 CUDA 12.9): Q8_0 CUDA 25.80 tok/s (39.8% of 336 GB/s roofline, 5559 MiB), NVFP4-mm CUDA 14.64 tok/s (13.3% roofline, 3479 MiB), NVFP4-mm CPU 1.57 tok/s. Per-token weight read shrinks 1.70x (matmul-only 1.889x) but NVFP4 v1 scalar-LUT kernel is COMPUTE-bound (13.3% vs 39.8% roofline) so the byte reduction is unrealized => dp4a/byte-perm follow-up warranted (recon §5 Q1).
